name: adb

name: air-controller-desktop
description: Android phone assistant,powered by Flutter.

name: android-messages-desktop
description: Messages for web, as a desktop app.

name: android-studio-latest
description: Unofficial. Android Studio as AppImages, release.

name: android-studio
description: Unofficial. Android Studio as AppImages, stable.

name: android-tools
description: Unofficial AppImage for the Android Platform tools, adb, fastboot, etc.

name: android-translation-layer
description: Unofficial, A translation layer that allows running Android apps on a Linux system.

description: Easy to use APK, Android reverse-engineering tool.

name: aya
description: A desktop application for easily controlling android devices, which can be considered as a GUI wrapper for ADB.

name: crossmobile
description: Create native iOS/Android/Windows apps in Java.

name: escrcpy
description: Graphical Scrcpy to display and control Android, devices powered by Electron.

name: etc1tool
description: Utility for compressing and decompressing ETC1 texture files. This is part of "platform-tools".

name: fastboot
description: Android bootloader tool for flashing, unlocking, and managing firmware. This is part of "platform-tools".

name: fauxx
description: Cross-device companion to Fauxx Android app that generates realistic decoy web activity through synthetic personas to pollute the profiles that data brokers and ad-tech build about you.

name: firetv-toolkit
description: Android-Toolkit, a GUI for adb, modify android devices.

name: flyingcarpet
description: Cross-platform AirDrop. File transfer between Android, iOS, Linux, macOS, and Windows over ad hoc WiFi. No network infrastructure required, just two devices with WiFi chips in close range.

name: github-store
description: A free, open-source app store for GitHub releases. Browse, discover, and install apps with one click. Powered by Kotlin and Compose Multiplatform for Android & Desktop.

name: guiscrcpy
description: GUI integration for android screen mirroring system.

name: hprof-conv
description: Converts Android HPROF heap dumps to standard Java HPROF format. This is part of "platform-tools".

name: joy2droidx
description: Turn Android phones into virtual Xbox 360 controller.

name: kdeconnect
description: Unofficial, A project that enables all your Android devices to communicate with each other.

name: koreader
description: A document viewer for E Ink devices. Supported fileformats include EPUB, PDF, DjVu, XPS, CBT, CBZ, FB2, PDB, TXT, HTML, RTF, CHM, DOC, MOBI and ZIP files. It’s available for Kindle, Kobo, PocketBook, Android and desktop Linux.

name: koreader-nightly
description: A document viewer for E Ink devices. Supported fileformats include EPUB, PDF, DjVu, XPS, CBT, CBZ, FB2, PDB, TXT, HTML, RTF, CHM, DOC, MOBI and ZIP files. It’s available for Kindle, Kobo, PocketBook, Android and desktop Linux. Nightly build.

name: linkora
description: Link organizer for Android and desktop with self-hosted sync.

name: make_f2fs_casefold
description: Creates F2FS filesystems with case-insensitive filename support. This is part of "platform-tools".

name: make_f2fs
description: Creates F2FS filesystems optimized for flash storage. This is part of "platform-tools".

name: mke2fs
description: Creates ext2/ext3/ext4 Linux filesystems. This is part of "platform-tools".

name: platform-tools
description: Official Suite of command line utilities to manage Android devices.

name: rquickshare
description: Rust implementation of NearbyShare/QuickShare from Android.

name: scrcpy
description: Display and control your Android device.

name: sqlite3
description: Command-line tool for managing SQLite databases. This is part of "platform-tools".

name: uad-ng
description: GUI Rust wrapper for ADB to debloat non-rooted Android devices.

name: waydroid-helper
description: App that provides a user-friendly way to configure Waydroid and install extensions, including Magisk and ARM translation (android).
